channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Venomous Himalayan pit viper actually comprises five distinct species
item.description: Hidden in the Himalayas, one of Asia's most mysterious venomous snakes has concealed a major secret for over 160 years.

item.title: Large Hadron Collider detects strange particle behavior that could rewrite physics
item.description: Scientists at CERN's Large Hadron Collider may have found the strongest evidence yet of physics beyond the Standard Model.

item.title: Researchers claim a nasal spray can reverse brain aging
item.description: A Texas A&M study found that a nasal spray reduced inflammation and restored brain energy, potentially reversing aging.

item.title: Global treasure map created to locate hidden rare earth deposits
item.description: Scientists mapped volcanic rocks to identify likely locations for rare earth element deposits worldwide.
